title: Oil falls as OPEC reiterates commitment to production hikes
section_path: Oil falls as OPEC reiterates commitment to production hikes
section_path_text: Oil falls as OPEC reiterates commitment to production hikes
summary:
Main
Energy markets remains on edge on supply shortages. Sentiment was also supported by the prospect of easing monetary policy in the US. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-02 143650.png | assets/2024-09-02_oil-falls-as-opec-reiterates-commitment-to-production-hikes_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_5c22d885422a.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil fell last week as the market ponders OPEC's plan to raise output in the next quarter.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Energy markets remains on edge on supply shortages. Sentiment was also supported by the prospect of easing monetary policy in the US.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil fell last week as the market ponders OPEC's plan to raise output in the next quarter. Several delegates with the OPEC+ alliance said last week that they expect to proceed with the production hikes.
